name: Advance America
description_short: Colorado Springs, CO's Advance America payday loan storefront at 1029 N Academy Blvd offers quick cash advances for local residents.
description_long:
Advance America at 1029 N Academy Blvd in Colorado Springs, CO serves the Academy Boulevard corridor with payday and title loans. This standalone storefront is located in a convenient retail area, providing direct access for Colorado Springs residents seeking short-term cash solutions.

At this Colorado Springs location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and cash advances. Call +1 719-573-2696 to speak with a representative about your options or to start the application process.

Colorado Springs residents often use this Advance America branch for unexpected expenses between paychecks. Bring a valid ID, recent pay stubs, and proof of a checking account. This is a direct lender storefront focused on quick approval.
address: 1029 N Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

company_info.headquarters: 1029 N Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Multiple loan products (payday, installment, title) serving different financial situations
Title loans up to $25,000 provide larger loan amounts than payday loans alone
Bilingual staff (English and Spanish) at physical locations
Convenient store hours including Saturday morning availability
High customer satisfaction rating of 4.9 out of 5 stars across 125,595 reviews
Online application option in addition to in-store visits
Nationally recognized and fully accredited company
Western Union money transfer services available
cons: APR and fee information not disclosed on website; payday/title loans typically carry high costs
Payday loans limited to $100-$500 with 2-4 week repayment, creating potential debt cycles
Title loans require vehicle ownership and paid-off status, excluding many consumers
In-store services only available at limited physical locations; not all areas served
Installment loans capped at $1,000, limiting usefulness for larger emergencies
best_for: Workers facing unexpected expenses between paychecks who need cash within days
Vehicle owners with immediate cash needs who can use title as collateral
Borrowers needing slightly larger amounts ($1,000+) with flexible multi-payment repayment
Spanish-speaking consumers in Jacksonville area requiring bilingual lending support
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for working adults in Jacksonville, FL facing genuine short-term cash emergencies (medical bills, car repair, unexpected expenses) who need same-day or next-day funding and have reliable income or a paid-off vehicle. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans carry substantially higher costs than traditional personal loans or bank products; consumers should exhaust alternatives first and only use these services as a true emergency measure, not a regular borrowing strategy.
services: Installment loans ($100-$1,000) with multiple payment options
In-store loan applications at physical locations
Same-day funding for emergency cash needs
Loan counseling to help customers choose appropriate loan type

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
